description: The episode closes with a lighthearted scene of Ward, Fitz, Simmons, and Skye playing cards together, teasing each other about tells, hiding cards, and Skye threatening to use the x-ray glasses. The camaraderie and levity signals the restoration of team morale after intense events.

transcript.line: Hmm. You know how I know I'm gonna beat you?
You have a tell, a psychological tic that lets me know you're bluffing. If I watch you carefully... If I watch you carefully...
Oh, sorry. Hang on. You know if I do this, that not only will I see Ward's cards, but I'll see you without any clothes on?
